20_tasks.title: Match greeting + response
20_tasks.instructions: Match call/message greetings with polite replies.

20_tasks.title: Which message was sent?
20_tasks.instructions: Listen/select the correct message topic: callback / schedule / confirm.

20_tasks.title: Core call verbs
20_tasks.instructions: Tap to practice: call back, leave a message, confirm, available, schedule.

20_tasks.title: Put message steps in order
20_tasks.instructions: Order: greet → request → time question → thanks.

20_tasks.title: Complete the callback request
20_tasks.instructions: Fill missing phrases: 'Can you call me back?' and a time question.

20_tasks.title: Say it clearly: key phrases
20_tasks.instructions: Repeat short phrases with app guidance (record if available).

20_tasks.title: Roleplay: scheduling a call
20_tasks.instructions: Student A requests; Student B offers 2 time options.

20_tasks.title: Fix the polite request
20_tasks.instructions: Select the more polite version of an awkward sentence.

20_tasks.title: Time expressions quick drill
20_tasks.instructions: Choose the correct time phrase for a given time card.

20_tasks.title: Write a 2-sentence message
20_tasks.instructions: Write: request + time suggestion.

20_tasks.title: Sort details: name/date/time
20_tasks.instructions: Choose where each detail goes in a template.

20_tasks.title: Grammar: confirm sentences
20_tasks.instructions: Complete: 'Just to confirm, it’s on...' / 'Yes, that’s correct.'

20_tasks.title: Conversation turn-taking
20_tasks.instructions: Select the best next line in a short call conversation.

20_tasks.title: Choose what to say
20_tasks.instructions: Given a situation (missed call, wrong time), pick an appropriate response.

20_tasks.title: Correct the mistakes
20_tasks.instructions: Fix 5 mistakes in short message samples.

20_tasks.title: Build a 4-line dialogue
20_tasks.instructions: Assemble lines into: greeting, request, confirmation, thanks.

20_tasks.title: Read and answer (message details)
20_tasks.instructions: Answer 5 questions from a sample message.

20_tasks.title: Speak: leaving a short voicemail
20_tasks.instructions: Record 15–25 seconds: who you are + why you’re calling + callback time.

20_tasks.title: L1 mastery quiz
20_tasks.instructions: Mixed MCQ: vocabulary + choose-best-response.

20_tasks.title: Practice session: call + confirm
20_tasks.instructions: Final practice: complete 1 dialogue and generate 1 short message.

20_tasks.title: Match shopping phrases
20_tasks.instructions: Match: size/fit questions with their answers.

20_tasks.title: Clothing store vocabulary
20_tasks.instructions: Practice: size, fit, try on, receipt, exchange, return.

20_tasks.title: What is the customer asking?
20_tasks.instructions: Listen and choose: bigger/smaller, different color, exchange, refund.

20_tasks.title: Order the return steps
20_tasks.instructions: Sequence: greet → item issue → show receipt → request exchange/return.

20_tasks.title: Fill the size/fit questions
20_tasks.instructions: Complete: 'Do you have this in a ___ size?' 'What size do you recommend?'

20_tasks.title: Choose the best response
20_tasks.instructions: Given staff/customer lines, pick the most natural next line.

20_tasks.title: Build a 5-line shop dialogue
20_tasks.instructions: Construct: ask availability → try on → fit comment → exchange/return request → confirm.

20_tasks.title: Drag return/exchange labels
20_tasks.instructions: Drag examples into categories: 'return' vs 'exchange'.

20_tasks.title: Polite requests practice
20_tasks.instructions: Choose correct request forms: could/would + verb.

20_tasks.title: Add a reason (because/for)
20_tasks.instructions: Complete: 'because it doesn’t fit' / 'for an exchange'.

20_tasks.title: Fill a return form
20_tasks.instructions: Enter: item, size, issue, requested action.

20_tasks.title: Fix incorrect return phrases
20_tasks.instructions: Correct 6 sentences with wrong word choice (e.g., receipt missing, wrong action).

20_tasks.title: Roleplay: exchange for a different color
20_tasks.instructions: Customer asks; staff suggests options; customer confirms.

20_tasks.title: Write a short return reason
20_tasks.instructions: Write 2–3 sentences explaining why you want to return/exchange.

20_tasks.title: Respond to staff questions
20_tasks.instructions: Listen to staff prompts: 'Do you have the receipt?' and choose replies.

20_tasks.title: Read a store policy mini text
20_tasks.instructions: Answer questions about what you can/can’t do (based on the given text).

20_tasks.title: Speak: try-on feedback
20_tasks.instructions: Record: describe fit ('too big/too small') and request next size.

20_tasks.title: L2 mastery quiz
20_tasks.instructions: MCQ + short answer: vocab, grammar, best response.

20_tasks.title: Practice session: shop + return
20_tasks.instructions: Complete 1 full scenario: ask size → decide exchange → confirm.

20_tasks.title: Fast practice: receipt & exchange
20_tasks.instructions: Timed round: choose correct phrases quickly.

20_tasks.title: Polite complaint openers
20_tasks.instructions: Match: 'Excuse me...' / 'Sorry, but...' to complaint types.

20_tasks.title: Dietary needs vocabulary
20_tasks.instructions: Practice: allergy, ingredient, without, no/less, spicy, cooked.

20_tasks.title: Identify the problem
20_tasks.instructions: Listen: overcooked, missing item, wrong order, allergy risk.

20_tasks.title: Fill the complaint + fix
20_tasks.instructions: Complete a dialogue: complaint → request fix → thanks/confirm.

20_tasks.title: I can’t / I’m allergic to
20_tasks.instructions: Complete sentences with correct form for dietary needs.

20_tasks.title: Staff question responses
20_tasks.instructions: Pick the best response to: 'Is there anything you can’t eat?'

20_tasks.title: Roleplay: allergy-safe order
20_tasks.instructions: Customer gives restriction; staff suggests adjustment; confirm order.

20_tasks.title: No/without ingredient filter
20_tasks.instructions: Choose which ingredient to remove based on the dietary card.

20_tasks.title: Read a restaurant message
20_tasks.instructions: Read a short message and answer comprehension questions.

20_tasks.title: Correct the dietary statement
20_tasks.instructions: Fix incorrect allergy/diet sentences.

20_tasks.title: Build a 6-line resolution dialogue
20_tasks.instructions: Sequence: greeting → complaint → explanation → request → staff response → thanks.

20_tasks.title: Write a short dietary note
20_tasks.instructions: Write 3 sentences: restriction + what you want + confirmation.

20_tasks.title: Speak: polite complaint
20_tasks.instructions: Record: open politely, state issue, request fix.

20_tasks.title: Sort phrases into categories
20_tasks.instructions: Sort phrases into Complaint / Dietary Need / Resolution Request.

20_tasks.title: L3 mastery quiz
20_tasks.instructions: MCQ on vocabulary + best response selection.

20_tasks.title: Choose a menu modification
20_tasks.instructions: Given a dish and allergy/diet card, pick the correct modification request.

20_tasks.title: Speed round: 20-second response
20_tasks.instructions: Instant prompt; respond in 1–2 sentences.

20_tasks.title: Swap roles (staff/customer)
20_tasks.instructions: Run the same scenario with reversed roles.

20_tasks.title: Practice session: complaint + dietary need
20_tasks.instructions: Complete one combined scenario end-to-end.

20_tasks.title: Exit ticket
20_tasks.instructions: Answer 3 questions + write 1 sentence: either a complaint or dietary request.

20_tasks.title: Habits match
20_tasks.instructions: Match habit phrases with pictures/situations.

20_tasks.title: Health vocabulary set
20_tasks.instructions: Practice: headache, stress, sleep, exercise, rest, balanced.

20_tasks.title: Often/sometimes/never
20_tasks.instructions: Choose the frequency adverb that fits a given routine statement.

20_tasks.title: Read: weekly routine profiles
20_tasks.instructions: Answer questions about each person’s habits.

20_tasks.title: Present simple for routines
20_tasks.instructions: Fill verbs: I usually ___ at 10 / She ___ three times a week.

20_tasks.title: Symptoms to questions
20_tasks.instructions: Match symptoms to simple questions staff/doctor might ask.

20_tasks.title: Fill the advice dialogue
20_tasks.instructions: Complete: symptom → advice with should + verb → thanks.

20_tasks.title: Best advice choice
20_tasks.instructions: Pick the most reasonable advice for a given symptom.

20_tasks.title: Fix should sentences
20_tasks.instructions: Correct wrong should-verb structure in 6 items.

20_tasks.title: Speak: my lifestyle routine
20_tasks.instructions: Record: 4 sentences about sleep/exercise/food/stress using frequency.

20_tasks.title: Write 5 routine sentences
20_tasks.instructions: Write about 1 week routine using often/sometimes/never.

20_tasks.title: Lifestyle decision map
20_tasks.instructions: Choose actions: rest, drink water, exercise, sleep, reduce stress (based on prompts).

20_tasks.title: Roleplay: ask for advice
20_tasks.instructions: Student A says symptom; Student B gives advice using should + verb.

20_tasks.title: Which advice is correct?
20_tasks.instructions: Listen to 2–3 advice options and choose the best match.

20_tasks.title: Build a 4-line health dialogue
20_tasks.instructions: Sequence: symptom → ask question → advice → closing.

20_tasks.title: Lesson summary: Health & lifestyle
20_tasks.instructions: Mixed MCQ: vocabulary, present simple, should/advice.

20_tasks.title: Practice session: routine + advice
20_tasks.instructions: Do both: describe routine and respond to a health prompt.

20_tasks.title: Choose the best lifestyle change
20_tasks.instructions: Pick which habit change fits each situation.

20_tasks.title: Pronounce key sounds in phrases
20_tasks.instructions: Practice phrases like: 'You should rest' / 'I often exercise'.

20_tasks.title: Exit ticket
20_tasks.instructions: Write 3 routine sentences + 1 advice sentence.
